stories.title: Tour de France 2026 : le parcours, le profil et les horaires de la 18e étape entre Voiron et Orcières-Merlette
stories.summary: La 18e étape du Tour de France 2026, qui se disputera le jeudi 23 juillet, emmènera le peloton sur 185,2 km entre Voiron et la montée finale vers Orcières-Merlette. Départ à 12h35 pour une arrivée prévue à 17h25. Orcières-Merlette, c'est Luis Ocaña en 1971, sa prise de pouvoir sur le Tour de France aux dépens d'Eddy Merckx lors de la 11e étape (avant de le perdre quatre jours plus tard en chutant dans la descente du col de Menté). Cette étape doit correspondre aux grimpeurs-baroudeurs éloignés de la course au général. Trois difficultés, la côte d'Engins (11,4 km à 5,4 %), celle de Monteynard (9,7 km à 5 %) et la montée finale vers Orcières-Merlette (7,1 km à 6,7 %).

stories.title: Fans in a frenzy after Harry Kane spotted with "favourite artist" Burna Boy
stories.summary: England captain Harry Kane was spotted at the same club as Afrobeats star Burna Boy, sparking widespread rumours about the two partying together Kane has openly admired Burna Boy since a 2023 ESPN UK interview, and has been filmed dancing to his music on multiple occasions Fans flooded social media with reactions after a video of the encounter began circulating online England captain Harry Kane has been spotted at the same club as Burna Boy, sparking rumours of the pair partying together. Kane has not hidden his admiration for the Nigerian star in the past. Fans spot Harry Kane with Burna Boy at a club, sparking rumours of the pair partying together.

stories.title: El deseo de Rodri choca contra la realidad del Real Madrid
stories.summary: Debate externo muy intenso y que por momentos extraña en Valdebebas al afirmarse que el Real Madrid está de acuerdo en las cifras que maneja Rodri para un futuro contrato que ponga fin a su estancia en el Manchester City, dando por hecho un acuerdo con el club blanco. Mientras, en el Real Madrid deslizan que nada de eso es verdad, que, como ha sucedido otras veces, se está dando forma a una situación alrededor del futuro del Balón de Oro del Mundial, alejada de la realidad y en la que no quieren participar.

stories.title: L'arbitre de la demi-finale France-Espagne réagit aux propos de Didier Deschamps : « Aucun commentaire ne nous fera douter »
stories.summary: Invité de l'émission « Jorge Ramos y su banda », l'arbitre salvadorien Ivan Barton, qui a dirigé la demi-finale de Coupe du monde entre la France et l'Espagne (0-2), a fait preuve de diplomatie et de fermeté en réponse aux interrogations de Didier Deschamps. Le sujet est clos. Ciblé par Didier Deschamps après l'élimination des Bleus en demi-finales de la Coupe du monde face à l'Espagne (0-2), l'arbitre salvadorien Ivan Barton a refusé de mettre de l'huile sur le feu. Tandis que ses compétences ont été remises en question par le sélectionneur de l'équipe de France, l'officiel de 35 ans assure ne pas avoir été affecté : « Non, absolument pas.

stories.title: Burger King makes major changes after thousands of customers sounded off
stories.summary: Visitors to Burger King may soon notice several changes inspired by updates that customers of the fast-food chain said they wanted. "Earlier this year, we opened our phone lines and invited people to share their honest feedback, and they did," a Burger King representative told Fox News Digital. "One of the biggest takeaways was that our guests want to feel welcomed when they walk in, know their order will be made the way they asked and have confidence that if something isn't right, we'll make it right." BURGER KING FANS SWEAR A SIMPLE TRICK GETS YOU A FRESHER WHOPPER, BUT NOT EVERYONE IS CONVINCED Burger King said the initiative generated thousands of customer phone calls and text messages.

stories.title: Medizinischer Notfall im Cockpit: Passagiermaschine aus Mallorca muss zwischenlanden
stories.summary: Medizinischer Notfall im Cockpit Passagiermaschine aus Mallorca muss zwischenlanden Von dpa Aktualisiert am 23.07.2026 - 11:42 Uhr Lesedauer: 1 Min. Auf dem Rückflug von Mallorca wird einem Piloten der polnischen Fluglinie Lot übel. Mitten in der Nacht landet die Maschine deshalb in Mailand. Die Sache geht glimpflich aus. Wegen eines medizinischen Notfalls des Piloten hat eine Passagiermaschine der polnischen Fluggesellschaft Lot auf dem Rückflug von Mallorca mitten in der Nacht in Italien zwischenlanden müssen. Das Flugzeug vom Typ Boeing 737 Max 8 war auf dem Weg von der spanischen Ferieninsel nach Warschau , als dem Piloten übel wurde.

stories.title: De Bondgenoten-Salar reageert voor het eerst op geruchten over relatiebreuk met Mercedes
stories.summary: Er gaan al een tijdje geruchten dat Salar en Mercedes uit De Bondgenoten niet langer een koppel zijn, maar is dat ook zo? Salar reageert nu voor het eerst op alle geruchten die de ronde doen. Salar & Mercedes Salar en Mercedes deden allebei mee aan De Bondgenoten en werden daar verliefd op elkaar. Ook buiten de loods hield hun relatie stand... tot nu dan volgens de roddels en geruchten. Zo werd Salar onlangs gespot op een datingapp, volgen de twee elkaar niet meer op Instagram en hebben ze foto's waar ze samen op staan verwijderd van hun sociale media. Het duo wilde niet reageren op alle geruchten, maar Salar heeft nu toch van zich laten horen bij Shownieuws .

stories.title: UTECA denuncia el "espacio marginal" que la televisión gratuita ocupa en los televisores actuales
stories.summary: La Unión de Televisiones Comerciales en Abierto (UTECA) ha puesto en marcha una nueva campaña de concienciación para denunciar la escasa visibilidad que, a su juicio, tiene la televisión gratuita en los televisores conectados a internet . La organización considera que los canales de la TDT han quedado relegados a un segundo plano en las pantallas de inicio de muchas Smart TV, dificultando el acceso de los usuarios a un servicio que sigue siendo el más consumido en España. La iniciativa comienza esta misma semana con la emisión de dos anuncios en los canales asociados a UTECA.

stories.title: 'Nottingham Forest meldt zich na deal van 135 miljoen voor Nederlandse aanvaller'
stories.summary: Ernest Poku ruilt de Bundesliga mogelijk in voor de Premier League. Volgens BILD staat de vleugelaanvaller van Bayer Leverkusen in de belangstelling van Nottingham Forest. Eerder deze maand schreef Kicker dat Leverkusen bereid is om mee te werken aan een vertrek van Poku (22), mits er minimaal 25 miljoen euro op tafel wordt gelegd voor de international van Jong Oranje. BILD meldt nu dat Forest belangstelling toont. Olivier Glasner is sinds deze zomer de nieuwe manager van The Tricky Trees. De Duitser zou onder de indruk geraakt zijn van Poku tijdens diens eerste seizoen in de Bundesliga. Volgens BILD hebben 'meerdere ploegen' uit de Premier League interesse.

stories.title: Monaco : Aladji Bamba va signer en Angleterre pour plus de 40M€
stories.summary: Actif sur le mercato avec les arrivées d’Ansu Fati (FC Barcelone), Sadibou Sané (FC Metz) et Flavio Nazinho (Cercle Bruges), l’AS Monaco doit aussi vendre. Le club de la Principauté s’est séparé pour le moment de Caio Henrique (Ajax Amsterdam), Kassoum Ouattara (Besiktas), Radoslaw Majecki (Pafos) et Krépin Diatta (libre). Les Monégasques sont sur le point de réaliser une grosse vente supplémentaire. Selon nos informations, le club anglais de Newcastle a bouclé l’arrivée du milieu défensif Aladji Bamba (20 ans). Le joueur va arriver aujourd’hui en Angleterre dans le cadre d’un transfert s’élevant à 41 millions d’euros, dont 5 millions d’euros de bonus.

stories.title: 6 Emmerdale spoilers for tonight confirm Dr Todd death suspect
stories.summary: Emmerdale spoilers follow from Thursday's episode (23 July), which is available to watch now on ITVX and YouTube but hasn't aired on ITV1 yet.In tonight's Emmerdale, Vanessa and Mackenzie share their frustration over the lack of justice in Charity's case against Dr Todd. But one of them seems determined to take control of the situation…Meanwhile, Cain is furious when his camping trip with Kyle is hijacked by Graham – and the simmering tension has worrying consequences.Read on for six big moments from Thursday's episode…1. Mack tries to move onIt's a new day for Charity after Helen's decision not to go to the police with a formal complaint against Dr Todd.

stories.title: "Ca n'a pas évolué depuis 20 ans": la ministre de la Santé annonce le doublement du plafond annuel de la franchise sur les médicaments
stories.summary: Le Premier ministre Sébastien Lecornu l'a annoncé cette semaine, l'assurance maladie est une piste importante d'économies pour les finances et le budget 2027. Première piste, les franchises médicales sur les médicaments que chaque patient paye lors de son passage en pharmacie. Cette franchise, limitée à 100€ actuellement, va doubler, assure ce jeudi 23 juillet sur RMC la ministre de la Santé Stéphanie Rist: "Le débat sur les franchises a eu lieu l'année dernière et a été tranché par le Premier ministre, il n'y aura pas d'augmentation des franchises, nous gelons le montant de ces franchises à 1€ sur les boîtes de médicaments, ça ne bougera pas".

stories.title: Em Itália já se critica as contratações de Ruben Amorim e Gonçalo Ramos
stories.summary: O antigo médio Massimo Mauro analisou o mercado dos grandes clubes da Serie A e destacou os riscos associados às contratações do Milan , especialmente a de Ruben Amorim como treinador e ainda a de Gonçalo Ramos , por 70 milhões de euros ao PSG . O agora político italiano considera que os rossoneri têm de mostrar outra faceta, depois de falharem o objetivo da Champions na época passada. «Os jogadores têm de ser colocados em condições de não terem desculpas: é preciso continuidade e é preciso um nível mais elevado, elementos que faltaram ao Milan na época passada. Demasiados altos e baixos, pontos perdidos contra equipas de média e pequena dimensão...

stories.title: Woman attacked by brown bear while hiking Alaskan trail
stories.summary: A woman is recovering after she was attacked by a brown bear while hiking through an Alaskan trail over the weekend, Alaskan authorities said. The unidentified victim was hiking on a trail above Bear Valley, a neighborhood in south Anchorage, with another person and three dogs Saturday around 5:30 p.m. when the bear came out of the trees and encountered the pair and their dogs, the Alaska Dept. of Fish and Game said. "High winds and inclement weather conditions at the time of the encounter may have increased the chance that the bear was surprised by the hikers and their dogs, even if they were making noise," the agency said in a statement.
sources: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

stories.title: Gigio e Alessia Elefante si sposano: il "sì" in Puglia. Tra gli invitati Haaland, Maldini, Guardiola, Barella
stories.summary: La Valle d’Itria si prepara a blindarsi per uno degli eventi mondani e sportivi più attesi dell'anno. Il portiere della Nazionale azzurra e del Manchester City, Gianluigi Donnarumma, sposerà la storica compagna Alessia Elefante in una cornice d'eccezione tra Locorotondo e Fasano. La cerimonia religiosa prenderà il via nella chiesa Madre del borgo barese, mentre il ricevimento si sposterà nell’esclusiva residenza Pettolecchia. Un'organizzazione curata nei minimi dettagli - con tanto di piano traffico comunale e una task force guidata dalla wedding planner Valentina Carella - che rievoca i fasti dei grandi matrimoni vip celebrati nella regione.

stories.title: Armando Obispo's Move to RC Lens Collapses Over Personal Terms
stories.summary: WILLEMSTAD – Curaçao international Armando Obispo will remain with PSV after his proposed transfer to French club RC Lens collapsed at the final stage due to disagreements over personal terms. According to reports, PSV and RC Lens had reached an agreement on a transfer fee of €5.5 million. However, the 27-year-old defender was unable to finalize a contract with the Ligue 1 side, causing the deal to fall through. The failed transfer is also a setback for PSV, which had planned to use the proceeds from Obispo's sale, along with expected income from the proposed transfers of Adama Nagalo and Ricardo Pepi, to strengthen its squad ahead of the new season.

stories.title: Stature présidentielle : François Hollande prend le pouvoir à gauche
stories.summary: Les vrais politiques le savent : c’est au début de l’été qu’il faut installer une image pour en profiter à la rentrée. François Hollande, qui navigue dans les eaux politiques depuis le début des années 1980, n’a pas oublié cette règle.

stories.title: Francia, maxi incendio fuori controllo in Gironda: 2.000 ettari in fumo e 12 mila evacuati
stories.summary: Prosegue senza sosta il vasto incendio che da mercoledì sta devastando la zona del bacino di Arcachon, nel dipartimento francese della Gironda. Le fiamme hanno già distrutto circa 2.000 ettari di boschi e costretto all'evacuazione quasi 12 mila persone, tra residenti e turisti. Nelle ultime ore le autorità hanno disposto, a titolo precauzionale, l'allontanamento di altre 7 mila persone, comprese quelle presenti in sei campeggi e in un villaggio naturista a nord di Cap Ferret, una delle mete balneari più frequentate dell'estate francese. Sul posto sono al lavoro oltre 500 vigili del fuoco con circa 150 mezzi, supportati da Canadair e altri velivoli antincendio.

stories.title: Paul Rowley: St Helens head coach leaves club with immediate effect
stories.summary: St Helens head coach Paul Rowley has stepped down from his position with the Super League club with immediate effect less than a year into the role. The 51-year-old joined the club before the 2026 season, having previously taken charge at Salford Red Devils, ending his tenure there after their financially-challenged 2025 campaign. Since joining Saints, however, the club have struggled for form and, with an injury crisis, are currently sixth in the table and six points behind leaders Leeds Rhinos. They have also lost six of their past 10 games in all competitions with Rowley's departure announced prior to Friday's derby against Wigan Warriors.

stories.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
stories.summary: Big picture: Shreyas Iyer looking for first win India 's role in helping smaller cricket economies generate income via TV rights generally dominates chatter ahead of a Zimbabwe tour. But series defeats to Ireland and England have veered the discussion towards India's T20I failings and team combinations. When they arrived in Zimbabwe two years ago, they were led by Shubman Gill. Now, T20Is are the only format Gill isn't part of. The captaincy mantle has been passed on from Suryakumar Yadav to Shreyas Iyer , who is winless as captain after seven games.

stories.title: El Consejo General del Poder Judicial aprueba cargas saludables para jueces: 2.400 asuntos en civil y 1.200 en social
stories.summary: El Pleno del Consejo General del Poder Judicial ha aprobado, con fecha 22 de julio, las cargas de trabajo saludables para los juzgados de Primera Instancia y de lo Social. La referencia provisional fija 2.400 asuntos en civil y 1.200 en social , en cumplimiento de la sentencia del Tribunal Supremo (STS 128/2022, Sala de lo Social) que obligó al CGPJ a regular la prevención de riesgos laborales en la carrera judicial. EN 30 SEGUNDOS ¿Qué ha resuelto el CGPJ? Ha aprobado un documento con parámetros de carga saludable para jueces: 2.400 asuntos en civil y 1.200 en social, como base para una futura instrucción. ¿Qué base jurídica aplica?

stories.title: Bologna, la bodycam «privata» che ha filmato l'intervento. L'agente: «Presa per tutelarmi»
stories.summary: DAL NOSTRO INVIATO BOLOGNA - «Perché quando sono in servizio porto sempre la bodycam acquistata da me? Per cautela. E per trasparenza... Ma non sono il solo. Sono tanti i colleghi a regolarsi così». A raccontarlo all’avvocato che lo assiste, Gabriele Bordoni, è il 23enne autista della «volante» inviata domenica al Pilastro dalla sala operativa del 112. Va un po’ immaginato, il momento in cui il poliziotto decide di azionare la telecamerina personale agganciata sul petto del gilet tattico. Anche perché siamo davanti a una modalità operativa assai estesa tra i reparti.

stories.title: Tom Holland Is Filming Fred Astaire Biopic Next and Plans to ‘Do All of the Dancing’ Himself: ‘I’ve Got So Much Work to Do’
stories.summary: Tom Holland is on the second of two consecutive blockbuster press tours in the space of a month – first for “The Odyssey” and now for “Spider-Man: Brand New Day” – but the actor is already gearing up for his next role: Fred Astaire . Holland, who is set to play the debonair dancer in an upcoming biopic, revealed he’s already started rehearsing for the film, which was first announced five years ago . “As soon as I finish with these tours, I’m diving back into the dance studio,” he told “Good Morning America’s” George Stephanopoulos.

stories.title: VAT cut to be applied to Manx electricity bills
stories.summary: The Isle of Man will cut VAT on domestic electricity bills from 5% to 0% starting October, matching a UK measure. The change will save a typical household about £50 annually and cost the Treasury between £1 million and £1.4 million in lost revenue. Small businesses and charities meeting specific criteria will also qualify for the relief.

stories.title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
stories.summary: The European Union fined Alphabet’s Google €890 million (about $1 billion) for breaching the Digital Markets Act by favoring its own services in search results and restricting Android developers from directing users to alternative payment options. The penalties, split into €460 million and €430 million, require Google to change its policies within 60 days or face further fines. The ruling follows a two-year investigation by the European Commission.

stories.title: „Es ist schlimm, was manche da raushauen“ – Dunja Hayali kritisiert Debatte um Leihmutterschaft
stories.summary: ZDF-Moderatorin Dunja Hayali hat für eine faire Debatte über das Thema Leihmutterschaft geworben. Das Thema sei eines, das man möglichst „mit Anstand, Respekt, Empathie – und möglichst ohne Polemik und Schuldzuweisungen“ führen sollte, sagte Hayali in einem in der Nacht von Mittwoch auf Donnerstag auf Instagram veröffentlichten Video. Es gebe viele Argumente für beide Positionen. Einerseits stünden „Missbrauch, Ausbeutungen, medizinische Schwierigkeiten“, andererseits die Selbstbestimmung der Frau. Sie hielte es für gut, wenn dabei sowohl die „christliche Perspektive, die auch ihre Daseinsberechtigung“ habe, als auch die progressiv-liberale Perspektive berücksichtigt werde.

stories.title: Why are UK fuel prices rising again?
stories.summary: UK fuel prices are rising again after peace talks between the US and Iran collapsed, pushing wholesale oil prices toward $100 a barrel. The price of Brent crude has surged from around $70 a barrel before the February 28 conflict to near triple digits. Analysts warn pump prices will keep climbing as long as tensions persist.

stories.title: UK millionaires ask Andy Burnham to tax them more
stories.summary: UK millionaires including Gary Lineker and Brian Eno have urged Prime Minister Andy Burnham to raise taxes on the wealthiest. A letter signed by 120 signatories calls for a 2% tax on fortunes over £10m to fund public services. The group says voluntary donations already exist but want mandatory wealth taxes to reduce inequality.

stories.title: St Helens boss Rowley leaves club day before derby
stories.summary: Paul Rowley has stepped down as head coach of St Helens with immediate effect, less than a year into his role. The club sits sixth in the Super League, six points behind leaders Leeds Rhinos, after losing six of their past 10 games. Assistant coach Eamon O'Carroll will take charge on an interim basis ahead of Friday's derby against Wigan Warriors.

stories.title: Bank of Ireland eyes domestic economic growth of 3.5%
stories.summary: Bank of Ireland forecasts domestic growth of 3.5% for 2026 and 2.5% in 2027 Updated / Wednesday, 22 Jul 2026 15:16 Bank of Ireland is forecasting that just under 40,000 homes will be built this year, up from 36,000 completed last year Bank of Ireland has forecast that the domestic economy will expand by 3.5% this year and 2.5% in 2027. It also expects just under 40,000 homes will be built this year up from 36,000 completed last year. The bank says the measure of the economy which includes the multinational activity, Gross Domestic Product, will fall by 3% this year as the surge in pharmaceutical exports which was experienced in 2025 unwinds.

stories.title: Argentina, petizione per ripetere la finale: già oltre 60.000 firme. Cosa può fare la FIFA?
stories.summary: Argentina, petizione per ripetere la finale: già oltre 60.000 firme. Cosa può fare la FIFA? Argentina sconfitta ma portata in trionfo dai tifosi: che festa a Buenos Aires! Video credit: SNTV Sono passati ormai tre giorni abbondanti dalla finale del Mondiale 2026 , vinto dalla Spagna contro l'Argentina per 1-0 grazie alla rete di Ferran Torres nei tempi supplementari. Prosegue, però, lo strascico dell'ultimo atto della rassegna iridata, che già era stato avvertito con l'apertura di un'inchiesta da parte della FIFA per la rissa avvenuta a fine match tra alcuni giocatori delle due selezioni.

stories.title: El PP se muestra "a disposición de una moción de censura si los socios de Sánchez deciden abandonarlo"
stories.summary: El Partido Popular se ha mostrado “a disposición de una moción de censura si los socios de Sánchez deciden abandonarlo”. Esta mañana Miguel Tellado, secretario general del PP, ha insistido en que el presidente del Gobierno debe “convocar elecciones y devolverle la palabra a los españoles”. “Lo que nos faltan son votos. Ellos (los ”socios de Sánchez“) sabrán. ¿Por qué siguen manteniendo a Sánchez en el poder?” ha preguntado abiertamente Tellado.

stories.title: Trésors de nos communes : à Bousies, la trompette de Maurice André, musicien de renom du XXe siècle, est bien gardée
stories.summary: L’artiste qui a révolutionné le monde de la trompette à partir des années 50 était venu à Bousies, en 1999. Il a offert l’une de ses trompettes aujourd’hui exposée dans une vitrine, dans la salle des mariages. Article réservé aux abonnés Ajouter aux sources préférées sur Google Publié: 23 Juillet 2026 à 12h25 Temps de lecture: 2 min C’est une belle histoire d’amitié qui a permis un fabuleux don. Celle qui liait Maurice André, grand trompettiste français à Jean Lebon, le chef de l’harmonie de Bousies. Les deux hommes se sont connus lors de leur service militaire. Ils partageaient la même passion pour la musique et ne se sont jamais perdus de vue. « Les parents de Jean avaient une ferme.

stories.title: Wegen LeBron James: Dennis Schröder vor einem spektakulären Wechsel in der NBA?
stories.summary: Wegen LeBron James: Dennis Schröder vor einem spektakulären Wechsel in der NBA? Die Cleveland Cavaliers könnten sich für die Verpflichtung von LeBron James womöglich von Dennis Schröder trennen. Für den deutschen Nationalspieler soll es aber schon einen besonderen Interessenten geben. Wie NBA-Insider Michael Scotto ( HoopsHype ) am Mittwoch berichtete, steht LeBron bei den Cavs noch immer ganz oben auf der Wunschliste. Zugleich haben sie auch Jonathan Kuminga weiterhin im Auge. Um finanziell für die beiden potenziellen Neuzugänge Platz zu machen, gelten Schröder und Max Strus als Trade-Kandidaten.

stories.title: Venice Title ‘The Difficult Bride’ Taps Films Boutique for World Sales (EXCLUSIVE)
stories.summary: Films Boutique has acquired international sales for “The Difficult Bride,” Rubaiyat Hossain’s supernatural feminist drama premiering in the Venice Film Festival’s Horizons competition. The film marks the first Bangladeshi feature to screen at Venice. The cast features three Bangladesh National Film Award winners.

stories.title: Leeds in James Trafford talks with Manchester City - The Athletic
stories.summary: Leeds United are in talks with Manchester City to sign James Trafford and the goalkeeper is leaning towards a switch to Elland Road. The Athletic reported last month that Newcastle United had rekindled their interest in Trafford, having tried to sign the England international last summer before his move to City. Leeds are seeking a goalkeeper after seeing Karl Darlow, who ended the season as No 1, depart on a free transfer to Manchester United.

stories.title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
stories.summary: Google now lets users sign in to their accounts using a selfie video as an alternative to passwords or two-factor authentication. The feature captures a short video of your face, which Google compares to a stored reference video to confirm your identity. Users can delete the video anytime and opt to share it for additional purposes.

stories.title: Darwin Núñez acelera su salida de Saudí con la vista puesta en el Barça
stories.summary: El delantero Darwin Núñez está ya forzando la máquina para salir del Al Hilal en este mercado de fichajes. Ni el club saudí cuenta con él, ni el jugador uruguayo está por la labor de continuar en un equipo que ha apostado claramente por Karim Benzema dejándole en el banquillo. Núñez se incorporó este martes a la concentración del equipo en Austria y espera solventar su situación antes del 3 de agosto, día en el que todo el grupo debe regresar ya para Arabia.

stories.title: Isabel Davis Named Director of BFI Filmmaking Fund – Global Bulletin
stories.summary: Isabel Davis has been named director of the BFI National Lottery Filmmaking Funds, overseeing £20 million annually for U.K. independent filmmakers. She starts a five-year term in October, replacing Mia Bays after eight years at Screen Scotland.

stories.title: Newcastle agree £34m deal for Monaco's Bamba
stories.summary: Newcastle United have agreed a £34 million deal for Monaco midfielder Aladji Bamba. The 20-year-old Frenchman is set to undergo a medical in Newcastle on Thursday before signing a long-term contract. The move follows Newcastle’s sale of Sandro Tonali to Tottenham last month.

stories.title: Forbes Daily: Jersey Mike’s IPO Could Make Investors Over $700 Million
stories.summary: Jersey Mike’s upcoming IPO is set to show investors the true meaning of “breadwinner.” The market debut could bring around $742 million in proceeds to existing shareholders, according to an SEC filing, with the sub sandwich chain planning to raise $1.09 billion with shares priced at $21 to $25 each. Since its 1956 founding , Jersey Mike’s has expanded to over 3,000 domestic locations and posted 20 consecutive years of positive sales growth at locations open at least a year. Blackstone, which holds a majority stake in the firm, will remain in control after the IPO, limiting the influence of public shareholders.

stories.title: Mourinho quiere a su 'Özil 2.0'
stories.summary: Cuando Arda Güler fichó por el Real Madrid, allá por el verano de 2023 a cambio de 30 millones, muchos vieron reflejada en el jugador turco la figura de Mesut Özil, un jugador que enamoró al madridismo pese a que solo estuvo tres temporadas. Sin embargo, en ese corto pero intenso periodo de tiempo, quien mejor rendimiento pudo sacar de su fútbol fue José Mourinho, el ahora entrenador blanco. Y es por ello que, con Arda Güler en la plantilla, el portugués puede tener a su 'Mesut Özil 2.0'.

stories.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 Trailer 3: Latest Update On The Final Piece Of The Summer Hype Train
stories.summary: GTA 6 - Real Dimez Credit: Rockstar Games To say the Grand Theft Auto community is waiting anxiously for GTA 6's third trailer is like saying Usain Bolt is kind of fast. We're turning over every stone in search of clues and hints at a date, scope and the overall impact of the trailer we think is coming but isn't confirmed. Let's talk GTA 6. Key Facts at a Glance Trailer 3 status: unannounced. Rockstar has confirmed nothing Trailer 1: December 4, 2023, leaked roughly 16 hours ahead of its scheduled premiere Trailer 2: May 6, 2025, released at approximately 9:30 p.m.

stories.title: River levels approach all-time low as drought announcement looms
stories.summary: River levels in Wales are nearing record lows amid extreme dry conditions, with July rainfall at just 5% of average. Natural Resources Wales is set to declare an environmental drought for parts of the country later today. Farmers warn of failing crops and heat-stressed livestock as wildlife suffers from shrinking waterways.

stories.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
stories.summary: Liverpool are confident of signing Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola. The 23-year-old impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup this summer. Arsenal and Manchester United are also interested in different targets.

stories.title: Riesiger Riss bedroht diesen Berg: Fels könnten ins Tal stürzen
stories.summary: "Besorgniserregend" Der Hochvogel in den Alpen droht zu brechen Aktualisiert am 23.07.2026 - 11:34 Uhr Lesedauer: 3 Min. Forscher fürchten um den Hochvogel im Allgäu. Was der Tod eines Berges mit tauenden Permafrostböden und Gletschern zu tun hat. Ein Naturschauspiel mit verheerender Zerstörungskraft steht den Allgäuer Alpen bevor. Der Gipfel des 2.592 Meter hohen Hochvogels droht auseinanderzubrechen, ein riesiger Felsspalt klafft im Gestein. Momentan ist der Riss gut 40 Meter lang, acht Meter tief und drei Meter breit. Er wächst stetig, sagte Professor Michael Krautblatter im ORF. Krautblatter ist Professor an der TU München, untersucht dort unter anderem Hangbewegungen.

stories.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: The United States and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark nuclear cooperation agreement allowing Riyadh to develop a civilian nuclear program. The deal includes a bilateral safeguards pact and grants U.S. companies significant access to Saudi Arabia’s nuclear energy sector. Experts warn the agreement could eventually permit uranium enrichment, raising proliferation concerns in a volatile region.

stories.title: Nobody in Europe knows or cares what Kemi Badenoch thinks. That’s a big mistake | Simon Nixon
stories.summary: S itting in Brussels, or one of the EU’s 27 chancelleries, one could be forgiven for tuning out the latest psychodramas in Britain’s Conservative party. After all, the country has a new Labour prime minister who is a pro-European keen to build upon the “reset” begun by Keir Starmer . Who cares what a party in opposition thinks about anything when it is still reeling from its landslide 2024 defeat, and languishing third in the opinion polls as it haemorrhages support from its right flank? It is easy to dismiss Kemi Badenoch and her party as a sideshow. That would be a mistake.

stories.title: If you think public sector workers have it better, that’s because we do
stories.summary: P arents, patients and public services users of all stripes look on with growing trepidation as negotiations between unions representing public sector workers and the Government have broken down, raising the spectre of that dreaded euphemism, “disruption”, over the coming weeks. The crux of disagreement is that the unions want agreement on pay increases to protect against inflation before they will discuss anything else, such as changes to working practices; the Government wants everything on the table, all at once, all over again, now that the existing collective agreement has expired. The unions have threatened industrial action if there is no movement between the sides.

stories.title: Ça brûle entre Openda et l'OL
stories.summary: Gigantesque Espagne : "Trois Euros et deux Coupes du monde dans les 18 dernières années !" Video credit: Eurosport Le retour en France de Loïs Openda ne devrait plus tarder. Selon les informations de la Gazzetta dello Sport , l'ancien Lensois devrait s'engager avec l'Olympique Lyonnais, qui a devancé plusieurs prétendants français dans ce dossier, notamment son ancien club, le RC Lens, mais aussi l'AS Monaco et le Stade Rennais.

stories.title: Thousands evacuated in France fires
stories.summary: Thousands of people have been evacuated in France’s south-west as wildfires rage, with over 2,000 hectares burned in the Gironde region. The fires come days after two firefighters died near Bordeaux airport, though no new injuries have been reported. Meanwhile in Sicily, authorities are battling more than 350 fires, including ten major blazes that prompted evacuations.

stories.title: Framework’s premium laptop is shipping with less RAM
stories.summary: Framework has raised prices for its Laptop 13 Pro after a memory supplier doubled costs, with prebuilt models now starting at $1,599. Some preorder customers received updated memory configurations and pricing, though Framework offers full refunds for those who cancel. New orders reflect the adjusted pricing and available memory options.

stories.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
stories.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

stories.title: Diesel Crisis Puts Poor Farmers Around the World at Risk
stories.summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has limited the shipment of diesel, depriving farmers of fuel for irrigation pumps and threatening the food supply.

stories.title: A New Target for Ukraine’s Long-Range Attacks: Russia’s Version of Amazon
stories.summary: Kyiv is escalating its air war by striking commercial warehouses, trying to bring the conflict closer to home for ordinary Russians.

stories.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It’s Going Nuclear.
stories.summary: The world’s largest exporter of crude oil stands to benefit from diversifying its energy sources — and freeing up more oil to sell.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

stories.title: Nuclear Energy Revival Puts Westinghouse in Prime Position
stories.summary: The company, which filed for bankruptcy protection in 2017, stands to benefit from growing support for nuclear power and President Trump’s deal with Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: Should Travelers Give Up on Summer in Western Europe Because of the Heat?
stories.summary: A favorite vacation option may be at risk because of rising temperatures. Even those sticking with their summer plans agree: More air conditioning would help.

stories.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
stories.summary: Alphabet reported a record negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion in its latest quarter as AI infrastructure spending surged to $45 billion. Revenue grew 23% to $119.8 billion despite the cash burn. The company now expects annual AI spending to reach $205 billion as it races to expand AI capabilities.

stories.title: Butterfly city blooms in shadow of office blocks
stories.summary: A mini meadow in Hull city centre has become a haven for ten butterfly species, including the rare small skipper. The project, launched in 2023 near St Stephen’s Shopping Centre, allows grass and wildflowers to grow undisturbed to support caterpillars. Organizers say the meadow’s success highlights how urban spaces can boost local wildlife.

stories.title: Alarm over hospital lung admissions for children in England’s poorest postcodes
stories.summary: Children in England’s poorest areas were 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections in 2024/25. Data shows 1,941 admissions per 100,000 in the most deprived areas compared to 1,380 in the least deprived. Experts warn air pollution and deprivation are key drivers, with calls for urgent action.

stories.title: Life-changing MS drug to help people walk now on NHS in England
stories.summary: Fampridine, the first drug to help some people with multiple sclerosis walk, is now available on the NHS in England. Up to 5,000 people a year could benefit from the treatment, which improves nerve signal transmission. The NHS will now cover the cost of the drug, previously paid for privately by many patients.

offbeat.title: Tour de France 2026 : le parcours, le profil et les horaires de la 18e étape entre Voiron et Orcières-Merlette
offbeat.summary: La 18e étape du Tour de France 2026, qui se disputera le jeudi 23 juillet, emmènera le peloton sur 185,2 km entre Voiron et la montée finale vers Orcières-Merlette. Départ à 12h35 pour une arrivée prévue à 17h25. Orcières-Merlette, c'est Luis Ocaña en 1971, sa prise de pouvoir sur le Tour de France aux dépens d'Eddy Merckx lors de la 11e étape (avant de le perdre quatre jours plus tard en chutant dans la descente du col de Menté). Cette étape doit correspondre aux grimpeurs-baroudeurs éloignés de la course au général. Trois difficultés, la côte d'Engins (11,4 km à 5,4 %), celle de Monteynard (9,7 km à 5 %) et la montée finale vers Orcières-Merlette (7,1 km à 6,7 %).

offbeat.title: Fans in a frenzy after Harry Kane spotted with "favourite artist" Burna Boy
offbeat.summary: England captain Harry Kane was spotted at the same club as Afrobeats star Burna Boy, sparking widespread rumours about the two partying together Kane has openly admired Burna Boy since a 2023 ESPN UK interview, and has been filmed dancing to his music on multiple occasions Fans flooded social media with reactions after a video of the encounter began circulating online England captain Harry Kane has been spotted at the same club as Burna Boy, sparking rumours of the pair partying together. Kane has not hidden his admiration for the Nigerian star in the past. Fans spot Harry Kane with Burna Boy at a club, sparking rumours of the pair partying together.

offbeat.title: El deseo de Rodri choca contra la realidad del Real Madrid
offbeat.summary: Debate externo muy intenso y que por momentos extraña en Valdebebas al afirmarse que el Real Madrid está de acuerdo en las cifras que maneja Rodri para un futuro contrato que ponga fin a su estancia en el Manchester City, dando por hecho un acuerdo con el club blanco. Mientras, en el Real Madrid deslizan que nada de eso es verdad, que, como ha sucedido otras veces, se está dando forma a una situación alrededor del futuro del Balón de Oro del Mundial, alejada de la realidad y en la que no quieren participar.

offbeat.title: L'arbitre de la demi-finale France-Espagne réagit aux propos de Didier Deschamps : « Aucun commentaire ne nous fera douter »
offbeat.summary: Invité de l'émission « Jorge Ramos y su banda », l'arbitre salvadorien Ivan Barton, qui a dirigé la demi-finale de Coupe du monde entre la France et l'Espagne (0-2), a fait preuve de diplomatie et de fermeté en réponse aux interrogations de Didier Deschamps. Le sujet est clos. Ciblé par Didier Deschamps après l'élimination des Bleus en demi-finales de la Coupe du monde face à l'Espagne (0-2), l'arbitre salvadorien Ivan Barton a refusé de mettre de l'huile sur le feu. Tandis que ses compétences ont été remises en question par le sélectionneur de l'équipe de France, l'officiel de 35 ans assure ne pas avoir été affecté : « Non, absolument pas.

offbeat.title: Burger King makes major changes after thousands of customers sounded off
offbeat.summary: Visitors to Burger King may soon notice several changes inspired by updates that customers of the fast-food chain said they wanted. "Earlier this year, we opened our phone lines and invited people to share their honest feedback, and they did," a Burger King representative told Fox News Digital. "One of the biggest takeaways was that our guests want to feel welcomed when they walk in, know their order will be made the way they asked and have confidence that if something isn't right, we'll make it right." BURGER KING FANS SWEAR A SIMPLE TRICK GETS YOU A FRESHER WHOPPER, BUT NOT EVERYONE IS CONVINCED Burger King said the initiative generated thousands of customer phone calls and text messages.

offbeat.title: Medizinischer Notfall im Cockpit: Passagiermaschine aus Mallorca muss zwischenlanden
offbeat.summary: Medizinischer Notfall im Cockpit Passagiermaschine aus Mallorca muss zwischenlanden Von dpa Aktualisiert am 23.07.2026 - 11:42 Uhr Lesedauer: 1 Min. Auf dem Rückflug von Mallorca wird einem Piloten der polnischen Fluglinie Lot übel. Mitten in der Nacht landet die Maschine deshalb in Mailand. Die Sache geht glimpflich aus. Wegen eines medizinischen Notfalls des Piloten hat eine Passagiermaschine der polnischen Fluggesellschaft Lot auf dem Rückflug von Mallorca mitten in der Nacht in Italien zwischenlanden müssen. Das Flugzeug vom Typ Boeing 737 Max 8 war auf dem Weg von der spanischen Ferieninsel nach Warschau , als dem Piloten übel wurde.

offbeat.title: De Bondgenoten-Salar reageert voor het eerst op geruchten over relatiebreuk met Mercedes
offbeat.summary: Er gaan al een tijdje geruchten dat Salar en Mercedes uit De Bondgenoten niet langer een koppel zijn, maar is dat ook zo? Salar reageert nu voor het eerst op alle geruchten die de ronde doen. Salar & Mercedes Salar en Mercedes deden allebei mee aan De Bondgenoten en werden daar verliefd op elkaar. Ook buiten de loods hield hun relatie stand... tot nu dan volgens de roddels en geruchten. Zo werd Salar onlangs gespot op een datingapp, volgen de twee elkaar niet meer op Instagram en hebben ze foto's waar ze samen op staan verwijderd van hun sociale media. Het duo wilde niet reageren op alle geruchten, maar Salar heeft nu toch van zich laten horen bij Shownieuws .

offbeat.title: UTECA denuncia el "espacio marginal" que la televisión gratuita ocupa en los televisores actuales
offbeat.summary: La Unión de Televisiones Comerciales en Abierto (UTECA) ha puesto en marcha una nueva campaña de concienciación para denunciar la escasa visibilidad que, a su juicio, tiene la televisión gratuita en los televisores conectados a internet . La organización considera que los canales de la TDT han quedado relegados a un segundo plano en las pantallas de inicio de muchas Smart TV, dificultando el acceso de los usuarios a un servicio que sigue siendo el más consumido en España. La iniciativa comienza esta misma semana con la emisión de dos anuncios en los canales asociados a UTECA.

offbeat.title: 'Nottingham Forest meldt zich na deal van 135 miljoen voor Nederlandse aanvaller'
offbeat.summary: Ernest Poku ruilt de Bundesliga mogelijk in voor de Premier League. Volgens BILD staat de vleugelaanvaller van Bayer Leverkusen in de belangstelling van Nottingham Forest. Eerder deze maand schreef Kicker dat Leverkusen bereid is om mee te werken aan een vertrek van Poku (22), mits er minimaal 25 miljoen euro op tafel wordt gelegd voor de international van Jong Oranje. BILD meldt nu dat Forest belangstelling toont. Olivier Glasner is sinds deze zomer de nieuwe manager van The Tricky Trees. De Duitser zou onder de indruk geraakt zijn van Poku tijdens diens eerste seizoen in de Bundesliga. Volgens BILD hebben 'meerdere ploegen' uit de Premier League interesse.

offbeat.title: Monaco : Aladji Bamba va signer en Angleterre pour plus de 40M€
offbeat.summary: Actif sur le mercato avec les arrivées d’Ansu Fati (FC Barcelone), Sadibou Sané (FC Metz) et Flavio Nazinho (Cercle Bruges), l’AS Monaco doit aussi vendre. Le club de la Principauté s’est séparé pour le moment de Caio Henrique (Ajax Amsterdam), Kassoum Ouattara (Besiktas), Radoslaw Majecki (Pafos) et Krépin Diatta (libre). Les Monégasques sont sur le point de réaliser une grosse vente supplémentaire. Selon nos informations, le club anglais de Newcastle a bouclé l’arrivée du milieu défensif Aladji Bamba (20 ans). Le joueur va arriver aujourd’hui en Angleterre dans le cadre d’un transfert s’élevant à 41 millions d’euros, dont 5 millions d’euros de bonus.

offbeat.title: 6 Emmerdale spoilers for tonight confirm Dr Todd death suspect
offbeat.summary: Emmerdale spoilers follow from Thursday's episode (23 July), which is available to watch now on ITVX and YouTube but hasn't aired on ITV1 yet.In tonight's Emmerdale, Vanessa and Mackenzie share their frustration over the lack of justice in Charity's case against Dr Todd. But one of them seems determined to take control of the situation…Meanwhile, Cain is furious when his camping trip with Kyle is hijacked by Graham – and the simmering tension has worrying consequences.Read on for six big moments from Thursday's episode…1. Mack tries to move onIt's a new day for Charity after Helen's decision not to go to the police with a formal complaint against Dr Todd.

offbeat.title: "Ca n'a pas évolué depuis 20 ans": la ministre de la Santé annonce le doublement du plafond annuel de la franchise sur les médicaments
offbeat.summary: Le Premier ministre Sébastien Lecornu l'a annoncé cette semaine, l'assurance maladie est une piste importante d'économies pour les finances et le budget 2027. Première piste, les franchises médicales sur les médicaments que chaque patient paye lors de son passage en pharmacie. Cette franchise, limitée à 100€ actuellement, va doubler, assure ce jeudi 23 juillet sur RMC la ministre de la Santé Stéphanie Rist: "Le débat sur les franchises a eu lieu l'année dernière et a été tranché par le Premier ministre, il n'y aura pas d'augmentation des franchises, nous gelons le montant de ces franchises à 1€ sur les boîtes de médicaments, ça ne bougera pas".

offbeat.title: Em Itália já se critica as contratações de Ruben Amorim e Gonçalo Ramos
offbeat.summary: O antigo médio Massimo Mauro analisou o mercado dos grandes clubes da Serie A e destacou os riscos associados às contratações do Milan , especialmente a de Ruben Amorim como treinador e ainda a de Gonçalo Ramos , por 70 milhões de euros ao PSG . O agora político italiano considera que os rossoneri têm de mostrar outra faceta, depois de falharem o objetivo da Champions na época passada. «Os jogadores têm de ser colocados em condições de não terem desculpas: é preciso continuidade e é preciso um nível mais elevado, elementos que faltaram ao Milan na época passada. Demasiados altos e baixos, pontos perdidos contra equipas de média e pequena dimensão...

offbeat.title: Woman attacked by brown bear while hiking Alaskan trail
offbeat.summary: A woman is recovering after she was attacked by a brown bear while hiking through an Alaskan trail over the weekend, Alaskan authorities said. The unidentified victim was hiking on a trail above Bear Valley, a neighborhood in south Anchorage, with another person and three dogs Saturday around 5:30 p.m. when the bear came out of the trees and encountered the pair and their dogs, the Alaska Dept. of Fish and Game said. "High winds and inclement weather conditions at the time of the encounter may have increased the chance that the bear was surprised by the hikers and their dogs, even if they were making noise," the agency said in a statement.
sources: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

offbeat.title: Gigio e Alessia Elefante si sposano: il "sì" in Puglia. Tra gli invitati Haaland, Maldini, Guardiola, Barella
offbeat.summary: La Valle d’Itria si prepara a blindarsi per uno degli eventi mondani e sportivi più attesi dell'anno. Il portiere della Nazionale azzurra e del Manchester City, Gianluigi Donnarumma, sposerà la storica compagna Alessia Elefante in una cornice d'eccezione tra Locorotondo e Fasano. La cerimonia religiosa prenderà il via nella chiesa Madre del borgo barese, mentre il ricevimento si sposterà nell’esclusiva residenza Pettolecchia. Un'organizzazione curata nei minimi dettagli - con tanto di piano traffico comunale e una task force guidata dalla wedding planner Valentina Carella - che rievoca i fasti dei grandi matrimoni vip celebrati nella regione.

offbeat.title: Armando Obispo's Move to RC Lens Collapses Over Personal Terms
offbeat.summary: WILLEMSTAD – Curaçao international Armando Obispo will remain with PSV after his proposed transfer to French club RC Lens collapsed at the final stage due to disagreements over personal terms. According to reports, PSV and RC Lens had reached an agreement on a transfer fee of €5.5 million. However, the 27-year-old defender was unable to finalize a contract with the Ligue 1 side, causing the deal to fall through. The failed transfer is also a setback for PSV, which had planned to use the proceeds from Obispo's sale, along with expected income from the proposed transfers of Adama Nagalo and Ricardo Pepi, to strengthen its squad ahead of the new season.

offbeat.title: Stature présidentielle : François Hollande prend le pouvoir à gauche
offbeat.summary: Les vrais politiques le savent : c’est au début de l’été qu’il faut installer une image pour en profiter à la rentrée. François Hollande, qui navigue dans les eaux politiques depuis le début des années 1980, n’a pas oublié cette règle.

offbeat.title: Francia, maxi incendio fuori controllo in Gironda: 2.000 ettari in fumo e 12 mila evacuati
offbeat.summary: Prosegue senza sosta il vasto incendio che da mercoledì sta devastando la zona del bacino di Arcachon, nel dipartimento francese della Gironda. Le fiamme hanno già distrutto circa 2.000 ettari di boschi e costretto all'evacuazione quasi 12 mila persone, tra residenti e turisti. Nelle ultime ore le autorità hanno disposto, a titolo precauzionale, l'allontanamento di altre 7 mila persone, comprese quelle presenti in sei campeggi e in un villaggio naturista a nord di Cap Ferret, una delle mete balneari più frequentate dell'estate francese. Sul posto sono al lavoro oltre 500 vigili del fuoco con circa 150 mezzi, supportati da Canadair e altri velivoli antincendio.

offbeat.title: Paul Rowley: St Helens head coach leaves club with immediate effect
offbeat.summary: St Helens head coach Paul Rowley has stepped down from his position with the Super League club with immediate effect less than a year into the role. The 51-year-old joined the club before the 2026 season, having previously taken charge at Salford Red Devils, ending his tenure there after their financially-challenged 2025 campaign. Since joining Saints, however, the club have struggled for form and, with an injury crisis, are currently sixth in the table and six points behind leaders Leeds Rhinos. They have also lost six of their past 10 games in all competitions with Rowley's departure announced prior to Friday's derby against Wigan Warriors.

offbeat.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
offbeat.summary: Big picture: Shreyas Iyer looking for first win India 's role in helping smaller cricket economies generate income via TV rights generally dominates chatter ahead of a Zimbabwe tour. But series defeats to Ireland and England have veered the discussion towards India's T20I failings and team combinations. When they arrived in Zimbabwe two years ago, they were led by Shubman Gill. Now, T20Is are the only format Gill isn't part of. The captaincy mantle has been passed on from Suryakumar Yadav to Shreyas Iyer , who is winless as captain after seven games.

offbeat.title: El Consejo General del Poder Judicial aprueba cargas saludables para jueces: 2.400 asuntos en civil y 1.200 en social
offbeat.summary: El Pleno del Consejo General del Poder Judicial ha aprobado, con fecha 22 de julio, las cargas de trabajo saludables para los juzgados de Primera Instancia y de lo Social. La referencia provisional fija 2.400 asuntos en civil y 1.200 en social , en cumplimiento de la sentencia del Tribunal Supremo (STS 128/2022, Sala de lo Social) que obligó al CGPJ a regular la prevención de riesgos laborales en la carrera judicial. EN 30 SEGUNDOS ¿Qué ha resuelto el CGPJ? Ha aprobado un documento con parámetros de carga saludable para jueces: 2.400 asuntos en civil y 1.200 en social, como base para una futura instrucción. ¿Qué base jurídica aplica?

offbeat.title: Bologna, la bodycam «privata» che ha filmato l'intervento. L'agente: «Presa per tutelarmi»
offbeat.summary: DAL NOSTRO INVIATO BOLOGNA - «Perché quando sono in servizio porto sempre la bodycam acquistata da me? Per cautela. E per trasparenza... Ma non sono il solo. Sono tanti i colleghi a regolarsi così». A raccontarlo all’avvocato che lo assiste, Gabriele Bordoni, è il 23enne autista della «volante» inviata domenica al Pilastro dalla sala operativa del 112. Va un po’ immaginato, il momento in cui il poliziotto decide di azionare la telecamerina personale agganciata sul petto del gilet tattico. Anche perché siamo davanti a una modalità operativa assai estesa tra i reparti.

offbeat.title: „Es ist schlimm, was manche da raushauen“ – Dunja Hayali kritisiert Debatte um Leihmutterschaft
offbeat.summary: ZDF-Moderatorin Dunja Hayali hat für eine faire Debatte über das Thema Leihmutterschaft geworben. Das Thema sei eines, das man möglichst „mit Anstand, Respekt, Empathie – und möglichst ohne Polemik und Schuldzuweisungen“ führen sollte, sagte Hayali in einem in der Nacht von Mittwoch auf Donnerstag auf Instagram veröffentlichten Video. Es gebe viele Argumente für beide Positionen. Einerseits stünden „Missbrauch, Ausbeutungen, medizinische Schwierigkeiten“, andererseits die Selbstbestimmung der Frau. Sie hielte es für gut, wenn dabei sowohl die „christliche Perspektive, die auch ihre Daseinsberechtigung“ habe, als auch die progressiv-liberale Perspektive berücksichtigt werde.

offbeat.title: Bank of Ireland eyes domestic economic growth of 3.5%
offbeat.summary: Bank of Ireland forecasts domestic growth of 3.5% for 2026 and 2.5% in 2027 Updated / Wednesday, 22 Jul 2026 15:16 Bank of Ireland is forecasting that just under 40,000 homes will be built this year, up from 36,000 completed last year Bank of Ireland has forecast that the domestic economy will expand by 3.5% this year and 2.5% in 2027. It also expects just under 40,000 homes will be built this year up from 36,000 completed last year. The bank says the measure of the economy which includes the multinational activity, Gross Domestic Product, will fall by 3% this year as the surge in pharmaceutical exports which was experienced in 2025 unwinds.

offbeat.title: Argentina, petizione per ripetere la finale: già oltre 60.000 firme. Cosa può fare la FIFA?
offbeat.summary: Argentina, petizione per ripetere la finale: già oltre 60.000 firme. Cosa può fare la FIFA? Argentina sconfitta ma portata in trionfo dai tifosi: che festa a Buenos Aires! Video credit: SNTV Sono passati ormai tre giorni abbondanti dalla finale del Mondiale 2026 , vinto dalla Spagna contro l'Argentina per 1-0 grazie alla rete di Ferran Torres nei tempi supplementari. Prosegue, però, lo strascico dell'ultimo atto della rassegna iridata, che già era stato avvertito con l'apertura di un'inchiesta da parte della FIFA per la rissa avvenuta a fine match tra alcuni giocatori delle due selezioni.

offbeat.title: El PP se muestra "a disposición de una moción de censura si los socios de Sánchez deciden abandonarlo"
offbeat.summary: El Partido Popular se ha mostrado “a disposición de una moción de censura si los socios de Sánchez deciden abandonarlo”. Esta mañana Miguel Tellado, secretario general del PP, ha insistido en que el presidente del Gobierno debe “convocar elecciones y devolverle la palabra a los españoles”. “Lo que nos faltan son votos. Ellos (los ”socios de Sánchez“) sabrán. ¿Por qué siguen manteniendo a Sánchez en el poder?” ha preguntado abiertamente Tellado.

offbeat.title: Trésors de nos communes : à Bousies, la trompette de Maurice André, musicien de renom du XXe siècle, est bien gardée
offbeat.summary: L’artiste qui a révolutionné le monde de la trompette à partir des années 50 était venu à Bousies, en 1999. Il a offert l’une de ses trompettes aujourd’hui exposée dans une vitrine, dans la salle des mariages. Article réservé aux abonnés Ajouter aux sources préférées sur Google Publié: 23 Juillet 2026 à 12h25 Temps de lecture: 2 min C’est une belle histoire d’amitié qui a permis un fabuleux don. Celle qui liait Maurice André, grand trompettiste français à Jean Lebon, le chef de l’harmonie de Bousies. Les deux hommes se sont connus lors de leur service militaire. Ils partageaient la même passion pour la musique et ne se sont jamais perdus de vue. « Les parents de Jean avaient une ferme.

offbeat.title: Wegen LeBron James: Dennis Schröder vor einem spektakulären Wechsel in der NBA?
offbeat.summary: Wegen LeBron James: Dennis Schröder vor einem spektakulären Wechsel in der NBA? Die Cleveland Cavaliers könnten sich für die Verpflichtung von LeBron James womöglich von Dennis Schröder trennen. Für den deutschen Nationalspieler soll es aber schon einen besonderen Interessenten geben. Wie NBA-Insider Michael Scotto ( HoopsHype ) am Mittwoch berichtete, steht LeBron bei den Cavs noch immer ganz oben auf der Wunschliste. Zugleich haben sie auch Jonathan Kuminga weiterhin im Auge. Um finanziell für die beiden potenziellen Neuzugänge Platz zu machen, gelten Schröder und Max Strus als Trade-Kandidaten.

offbeat.title: Leeds in James Trafford talks with Manchester City - The Athletic
offbeat.summary: Leeds United are in talks with Manchester City to sign James Trafford and the goalkeeper is leaning towards a switch to Elland Road. The Athletic reported last month that Newcastle United had rekindled their interest in Trafford, having tried to sign the England international last summer before his move to City. Leeds are seeking a goalkeeper after seeing Karl Darlow, who ended the season as No 1, depart on a free transfer to Manchester United.

offbeat.title: Darwin Núñez acelera su salida de Saudí con la vista puesta en el Barça
offbeat.summary: El delantero Darwin Núñez está ya forzando la máquina para salir del Al Hilal en este mercado de fichajes. Ni el club saudí cuenta con él, ni el jugador uruguayo está por la labor de continuar en un equipo que ha apostado claramente por Karim Benzema dejándole en el banquillo. Núñez se incorporó este martes a la concentración del equipo en Austria y espera solventar su situación antes del 3 de agosto, día en el que todo el grupo debe regresar ya para Arabia.

offbeat.title: Forbes Daily: Jersey Mike’s IPO Could Make Investors Over $700 Million
offbeat.summary: Jersey Mike’s upcoming IPO is set to show investors the true meaning of “breadwinner.” The market debut could bring around $742 million in proceeds to existing shareholders, according to an SEC filing, with the sub sandwich chain planning to raise $1.09 billion with shares priced at $21 to $25 each. Since its 1956 founding , Jersey Mike’s has expanded to over 3,000 domestic locations and posted 20 consecutive years of positive sales growth at locations open at least a year. Blackstone, which holds a majority stake in the firm, will remain in control after the IPO, limiting the influence of public shareholders.

offbeat.title: Mourinho quiere a su 'Özil 2.0'
offbeat.summary: Cuando Arda Güler fichó por el Real Madrid, allá por el verano de 2023 a cambio de 30 millones, muchos vieron reflejada en el jugador turco la figura de Mesut Özil, un jugador que enamoró al madridismo pese a que solo estuvo tres temporadas. Sin embargo, en ese corto pero intenso periodo de tiempo, quien mejor rendimiento pudo sacar de su fútbol fue José Mourinho, el ahora entrenador blanco. Y es por ello que, con Arda Güler en la plantilla, el portugués puede tener a su 'Mesut Özil 2.0'.

offbeat.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 Trailer 3: Latest Update On The Final Piece Of The Summer Hype Train
offbeat.summary: GTA 6 - Real Dimez Credit: Rockstar Games To say the Grand Theft Auto community is waiting anxiously for GTA 6's third trailer is like saying Usain Bolt is kind of fast. We're turning over every stone in search of clues and hints at a date, scope and the overall impact of the trailer we think is coming but isn't confirmed. Let's talk GTA 6. Key Facts at a Glance Trailer 3 status: unannounced. Rockstar has confirmed nothing Trailer 1: December 4, 2023, leaked roughly 16 hours ahead of its scheduled premiere Trailer 2: May 6, 2025, released at approximately 9:30 p.m.

offbeat.title: Riesiger Riss bedroht diesen Berg: Fels könnten ins Tal stürzen
offbeat.summary: "Besorgniserregend" Der Hochvogel in den Alpen droht zu brechen Aktualisiert am 23.07.2026 - 11:34 Uhr Lesedauer: 3 Min. Forscher fürchten um den Hochvogel im Allgäu. Was der Tod eines Berges mit tauenden Permafrostböden und Gletschern zu tun hat. Ein Naturschauspiel mit verheerender Zerstörungskraft steht den Allgäuer Alpen bevor. Der Gipfel des 2.592 Meter hohen Hochvogels droht auseinanderzubrechen, ein riesiger Felsspalt klafft im Gestein. Momentan ist der Riss gut 40 Meter lang, acht Meter tief und drei Meter breit. Er wächst stetig, sagte Professor Michael Krautblatter im ORF. Krautblatter ist Professor an der TU München, untersucht dort unter anderem Hangbewegungen.

offbeat.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
offbeat.summary: The United States and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark nuclear cooperation agreement allowing Riyadh to develop a civilian nuclear program. The deal includes a bilateral safeguards pact and grants U.S. companies significant access to Saudi Arabia’s nuclear energy sector. Experts warn the agreement could eventually permit uranium enrichment, raising proliferation concerns in a volatile region.

offbeat.title: Nobody in Europe knows or cares what Kemi Badenoch thinks. That’s a big mistake | Simon Nixon
offbeat.summary: S itting in Brussels, or one of the EU’s 27 chancelleries, one could be forgiven for tuning out the latest psychodramas in Britain’s Conservative party. After all, the country has a new Labour prime minister who is a pro-European keen to build upon the “reset” begun by Keir Starmer . Who cares what a party in opposition thinks about anything when it is still reeling from its landslide 2024 defeat, and languishing third in the opinion polls as it haemorrhages support from its right flank? It is easy to dismiss Kemi Badenoch and her party as a sideshow. That would be a mistake.

offbeat.title: If you think public sector workers have it better, that’s because we do
offbeat.summary: P arents, patients and public services users of all stripes look on with growing trepidation as negotiations between unions representing public sector workers and the Government have broken down, raising the spectre of that dreaded euphemism, “disruption”, over the coming weeks. The crux of disagreement is that the unions want agreement on pay increases to protect against inflation before they will discuss anything else, such as changes to working practices; the Government wants everything on the table, all at once, all over again, now that the existing collective agreement has expired. The unions have threatened industrial action if there is no movement between the sides.

offbeat.title: Ça brûle entre Openda et l'OL
offbeat.summary: Gigantesque Espagne : "Trois Euros et deux Coupes du monde dans les 18 dernières années !" Video credit: Eurosport Le retour en France de Loïs Openda ne devrait plus tarder. Selon les informations de la Gazzetta dello Sport , l'ancien Lensois devrait s'engager avec l'Olympique Lyonnais, qui a devancé plusieurs prétendants français dans ce dossier, notamment son ancien club, le RC Lens, mais aussi l'AS Monaco et le Stade Rennais.

offbeat.title: Thousands evacuated in France fires
offbeat.summary: Thousands of people have been evacuated in France’s south-west as wildfires rage, with over 2,000 hectares burned in the Gironde region. The fires come days after two firefighters died near Bordeaux airport, though no new injuries have been reported. Meanwhile in Sicily, authorities are battling more than 350 fires, including ten major blazes that prompted evacuations.

offbeat.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
offbeat.summary: Alphabet reported a record negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion in its latest quarter as AI infrastructure spending surged to $45 billion. Revenue grew 23% to $119.8 billion despite the cash burn. The company now expects annual AI spending to reach $205 billion as it races to expand AI capabilities.

entertainment.title: Tom Holland Is Filming Fred Astaire Biopic Next and Plans to ‘Do All of the Dancing’ Himself: ‘I’ve Got So Much Work to Do’
entertainment.summary: Tom Holland is on the second of two consecutive blockbuster press tours in the space of a month – first for “The Odyssey” and now for “Spider-Man: Brand New Day” – but the actor is already gearing up for his next role: Fred Astaire . Holland, who is set to play the debonair dancer in an upcoming biopic, revealed he’s already started rehearsing for the film, which was first announced five years ago . “As soon as I finish with these tours, I’m diving back into the dance studio,” he told “Good Morning America’s” George Stephanopoulos.

entertainment.title: Venice Title ‘The Difficult Bride’ Taps Films Boutique for World Sales (EXCLUSIVE)
entertainment.summary: Films Boutique has acquired international sales for “The Difficult Bride,” Rubaiyat Hossain’s supernatural feminist drama premiering in the Venice Film Festival’s Horizons competition. The film marks the first Bangladeshi feature to screen at Venice. The cast features three Bangladesh National Film Award winners.

entertainment.title: Isabel Davis Named Director of BFI Filmmaking Fund – Global Bulletin
entertainment.summary: Isabel Davis has been named director of the BFI National Lottery Filmmaking Funds, overseeing £20 million annually for U.K. independent filmmakers. She starts a five-year term in October, replacing Mia Bays after eight years at Screen Scotland.

crisis.title: VAT cut to be applied to Manx electricity bills
crisis.summary: The Isle of Man will cut VAT on domestic electricity bills from 5% to 0% starting October, matching a UK measure. The change will save a typical household about £50 annually and cost the Treasury between £1 million and £1.4 million in lost revenue. Small businesses and charities meeting specific criteria will also qualify for the relief.

crisis.title: Why are UK fuel prices rising again?
crisis.summary: UK fuel prices are rising again after peace talks between the US and Iran collapsed, pushing wholesale oil prices toward $100 a barrel. The price of Brent crude has surged from around $70 a barrel before the February 28 conflict to near triple digits. Analysts warn pump prices will keep climbing as long as tensions persist.

crisis.title: Diesel Crisis Puts Poor Farmers Around the World at Risk
crisis.summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has limited the shipment of diesel, depriving farmers of fuel for irrigation pumps and threatening the food supply.

tech.title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
tech.summary: The European Union fined Alphabet’s Google €890 million (about $1 billion) for breaching the Digital Markets Act by favoring its own services in search results and restricting Android developers from directing users to alternative payment options. The penalties, split into €460 million and €430 million, require Google to change its policies within 60 days or face further fines. The ruling follows a two-year investigation by the European Commission.

tech.title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
tech.summary: Google now lets users sign in to their accounts using a selfie video as an alternative to passwords or two-factor authentication. The feature captures a short video of your face, which Google compares to a stored reference video to confirm your identity. Users can delete the video anytime and opt to share it for additional purposes.

tech.title: Framework’s premium laptop is shipping with less RAM
tech.summary: Framework has raised prices for its Laptop 13 Pro after a memory supplier doubled costs, with prebuilt models now starting at $1,599. Some preorder customers received updated memory configurations and pricing, though Framework offers full refunds for those who cancel. New orders reflect the adjusted pricing and available memory options.

politics.title: UK millionaires ask Andy Burnham to tax them more
politics.summary: UK millionaires including Gary Lineker and Brian Eno have urged Prime Minister Andy Burnham to raise taxes on the wealthiest. A letter signed by 120 signatories calls for a 2% tax on fortunes over £10m to fund public services. The group says voluntary donations already exist but want mandatory wealth taxes to reduce inequality.

politics.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
politics.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

politics.title: Nuclear Energy Revival Puts Westinghouse in Prime Position
politics.summary: The company, which filed for bankruptcy protection in 2017, stands to benefit from growing support for nuclear power and President Trump’s deal with Saudi Arabia.

sports.title: St Helens boss Rowley leaves club day before derby
sports.summary: Paul Rowley has stepped down as head coach of St Helens with immediate effect, less than a year into his role. The club sits sixth in the Super League, six points behind leaders Leeds Rhinos, after losing six of their past 10 games. Assistant coach Eamon O'Carroll will take charge on an interim basis ahead of Friday's derby against Wigan Warriors.

sports.title: Newcastle agree £34m deal for Monaco's Bamba
sports.summary: Newcastle United have agreed a £34 million deal for Monaco midfielder Aladji Bamba. The 20-year-old Frenchman is set to undergo a medical in Newcastle on Thursday before signing a long-term contract. The move follows Newcastle’s sale of Sandro Tonali to Tottenham last month.

sports.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
sports.summary: Liverpool are confident of signing Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola. The 23-year-old impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup this summer. Arsenal and Manchester United are also interested in different targets.

facts.title: River levels approach all-time low as drought announcement looms
facts.summary: River levels in Wales are nearing record lows amid extreme dry conditions, with July rainfall at just 5% of average. Natural Resources Wales is set to declare an environmental drought for parts of the country later today. Farmers warn of failing crops and heat-stressed livestock as wildlife suffers from shrinking waterways.

facts.title: Should Travelers Give Up on Summer in Western Europe Because of the Heat?
facts.summary: A favorite vacation option may be at risk because of rising temperatures. Even those sticking with their summer plans agree: More air conditioning would help.

facts.title: Butterfly city blooms in shadow of office blocks
facts.summary: A mini meadow in Hull city centre has become a haven for ten butterfly species, including the rare small skipper. The project, launched in 2023 near St Stephen’s Shopping Centre, allows grass and wildflowers to grow undisturbed to support caterpillars. Organizers say the meadow’s success highlights how urban spaces can boost local wildlife.

breaking.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
breaking.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

breaking.title: A New Target for Ukraine’s Long-Range Attacks: Russia’s Version of Amazon
breaking.summary: Kyiv is escalating its air war by striking commercial warehouses, trying to bring the conflict closer to home for ordinary Russians.

breaking.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It’s Going Nuclear.
breaking.summary: The world’s largest exporter of crude oil stands to benefit from diversifying its energy sources — and freeing up more oil to sell.

health.title: Alarm over hospital lung admissions for children in England’s poorest postcodes
health.summary: Children in England’s poorest areas were 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections in 2024/25. Data shows 1,941 admissions per 100,000 in the most deprived areas compared to 1,380 in the least deprived. Experts warn air pollution and deprivation are key drivers, with calls for urgent action.

health.title: Life-changing MS drug to help people walk now on NHS in England
health.summary: Fampridine, the first drug to help some people with multiple sclerosis walk, is now available on the NHS in England. Up to 5,000 people a year could benefit from the treatment, which improves nerve signal transmission. The NHS will now cover the cost of the drug, previously paid for privately by many patients.
